steps.title: Scan for the highest value
steps.content: The table presents housing starts in thousands for each month from January to April 2022. Reading across: January (1,669), February (1,771), March (1,713), April (1,803).

steps.title: Match the maximum to the choices
steps.content: April shows 1,803, which is the largest figure in the table. The other three months—January, February, and March—all show lower values. That matches choice A — A is correct.
